task: Phase 10 v0.1.7 — Windows PS1 hooks (sibling powershell entry in hooks.json + bin/install.ps1 + hooks/session-start.ps1). Existing sh files byte-identical. Floor: Claude Code >= 2.1.84. Plan: .omc/plans/phase-10-windows-ps1-hooks-v2.md (consensus round 2/5 APPROVE).

stories.title: macOS noise spike — verify wrong-OS spawn behavior of `"shell":"powershell"` hook
acceptanceCriteria: Setup minimal stub plugin in /tmp/ps-spike-plugin/ with hooks.json containing only ONE SessionStart hook: {"shell":"powershell","command":"powershell -Command 'exit 0'"}.
Run `claude` (or harness equivalent) on this macOS host with that plugin loaded; capture stderr + Claude Code session output.
If powershell.exe not on PATH (likely on macOS without pwsh), document the exact behavior: silent / visible-error in session output / popup.
If pwsh IS installed (PS Core cross-platform), test that branch separately — should run successfully.

Write findings to docs/pilot/v0.1.7-spike-result.txt with: outcome category (silent / visible-error / popup), exact stderr captured, recommendation for US-1003 (no guard needed / add `if (-not $IsWindows) { exit 0 }` first line / skip Option B entirely).

If outcome = visible-error or popup → US-1002 PS_SCRIPT first line MUST be `if (-not $IsWindows) { exit 0 }` AND US-1003 hook command MUST add a `Get-Command powershell -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue` probe.
If outcome = silent → US-1003 ships unmodified per plan.

stories.title: bin/install.ps1 — Windows installer mirror of bin/install.sh (no Add-Type, EDR-clean)
acceptanceCriteria: New file bin/install.ps1 — Windows PowerShell 5.1+ installer mirror of bin/install.sh.
RELEASE_VERSION constant = 'v0.1.7' (matches install.sh:48 post-bump).
Detect arch: $env:PROCESSOR_ARCHITECTURE = 'AMD64' → windows-amd64.exe (only arch CI builds).
Download via Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://github.com/jocoding-ax-partners/axhub/releases/download/$RELEASE_VERSION/axhub-helpers-windows-amd64.exe" -OutFile "$TargetPath.tmp" -TimeoutSec 600.
Move-Item $TargetPath.tmp $TargetPath -Force, then Start-Sleep -Seconds 2 + Test-Path $TargetPath re-check (Defender post-Move quarantine pre-mortem #6).

If existing link/file at TARGET path: explicit `if (Test-Path -PathType Any) { Remove-Item -Force }` pattern. NO `||` operator emulation. Comment: `# NOTE: bin/install.sh:80 has known operator precedence bug; PS mirror uses explicit Test-Path/Remove-Item.`
NO Add-Type, NO inline C#, NO Reflection.Assembly — EDR-clean (Phase 9 PInvoke pattern not used in installer).
Try/catch [System.IO.PathTooLongException] for MAX_PATH (pre-mortem #5) → 4-part Korean error pointing to `subst N: <long-path>` workaround.
Try/catch HTTP 407 (NTLM proxy pre-mortem #7) → 4-part Korean error → suggest `-Proxy $env:HTTPS_PROXY -ProxyUseDefaultCredentials`.
Try/catch [System.Net.WebException] for slow corp network → 4-part Korean → AXHUB_TOKEN env var fallback.
Every catch: emit `Write-Output (ConvertTo-Json @{ systemMessage = '<4-part Korean>' } -Compress)` then `exit 0` (don't block, surface).
ASCII-clean (no U+200B, no smart quotes — verified via `perl -ne 'print if /[\x{200B}-\x{200F}\x{FEFF}]/' bin/install.ps1` returns empty).
Korean error messages all 4-part (감정 / 원인 / 해결 / 다음액션) per error-empathy-catalog.md.

stories.title: hooks/session-start.ps1 — Windows SessionStart hook mirror with proper XDG paths
acceptanceCriteria: New file hooks/session-start.ps1 — PowerShell 5.1+ mirror of hooks/session-start.sh.
If US-1000 outcome = visible-error/popup: first line `if (-not $IsWindows) { exit 0 }`. Else: first line `$ErrorActionPreference = 'Stop'`.

Check `$Helper = Join-Path $env:CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT 'bin\axhub-helpers-windows-amd64.exe'`. If missing, run install.ps1 → capture `$installExit = $LASTEXITCODE` → if non-zero, surface 4-part Korean systemMessage + exit 0.
Run `& $Helper session-start` (binary subcommand) — direct exe call, not PS-spawned.
Run `& $Helper token-init` after session-start.

State dir for breadcrumb (when AXHUB_TELEMETRY=1): `$StateDir = if ($env:XDG_STATE_HOME) { Join-Path $env:XDG_STATE_HOME 'axhub-plugin' } else { Join-Path $env:USERPROFILE '.local\state\axhub-plugin' }` — byte-mirror of telemetry.ts:40-44 (XDG_STATE_HOME fallback to ~/.local/state, NOT %LOCALAPPDATA%).

Token dir for cmdTokenInit reads (separate from state): `$TokenDir = if ($env:XDG_CONFIG_HOME) { Join-Path $env:XDG_CONFIG_HOME 'axhub-plugin' } else { Join-Path $env:USERPROFILE '.config\axhub-plugin' }` — mirrors index.ts:441 cmdTokenInit (XDG_CONFIG_HOME, NOT XDG_STATE_HOME).
Every catch (top-level + nested) emits `Write-Output (ConvertTo-Json @{ systemMessage = '<4-part Korean>' } -Compress)` then `exit 0`. NO bare Write-Output.
Try/catch [System.IO.PathTooLongException] for MAX_PATH (pre-mortem #5).
Try/catch for AMSI/EDR quarantine (pre-mortem #2) — detect via spawn-fail or signal != null.
ASCII-clean.
Korean errors 4-part.

stories.title: hooks/hooks.json — sibling powershell SessionStart entry (bash[0] byte-identical)
acceptanceCriteria: hooks/hooks.json modified: SessionStart array gets a NEW second entry alongside existing bash entry. Bash entry [0] preserved BYTE-IDENTICAL (verified via `git diff hooks/hooks.json` — only +N lines, 0 changed lines in bash entry).
New entry [1]: {"hooks":[{"type":"command","shell":"powershell","command":"powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}\\hooks\\session-start.ps1","timeout":30}]}.
If US-1000 outcome required guard: add `Get-Command powershell -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if (-not $?) { exit 0 }` to command prefix.
JSON valid (jq '.' < hooks/hooks.json passes).
PreToolUse + PostToolUse hooks UNTOUCHED.

stories.title: tests — 16 NEW test() blocks + 6 NEW expect() in existing files
acceptanceCriteria: New file tests/install-ps1.test.ts — 7 cases: (1) RELEASE_VERSION literal v0.1.7 + parity with install.sh:48 regex-extracted, (2) AMD64 arch detection, (3) Invoke-WebRequest with -TimeoutSec 600, (4) Move-Item + Start-Sleep + Test-Path re-check (Defender pre-mortem), (5) NO Add-Type / Reflection.Assembly (EDR-clean), (6) explicit Test-Path/Remove-Item NOT `||` operator + comment naming bin/install.sh:80 bug, (7) every catch ConvertTo-Json @{systemMessage=...} envelope + exit 0.

New file tests/session-start-ps1.test.ts — 9 cases: (1) first line guard (if US-1000 required) OR ErrorActionPreference Stop, (2) $Helper path uses CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT, (3) install.ps1 spawn captures $LASTEXITCODE, (4) `& $Helper session-start` direct exe call, (5) `& $Helper token-init` after session-start, (6) MAX_PATH catch, (7) AMSI/EDR catch, (8) state dir XDG_STATE_HOME mirror (NO LOCALAPPDATA literal in source), (9) token dir XDG_CONFIG_HOME mirror DISTINCT from state dir.

tests/manifest.test.ts — extend with 5 NEW expect() asserting hooks.json: (a) bash entry [0] byte-identical to v0.1.6 baseline, (b) new entry [1] uses shell:powershell, (c) command references session-start.ps1, (d) timeout 30, (e) JSON valid.
tests/keychain-windows.test.ts (or similar telemetry test) — extend with 1 NEW expect() asserting telemetry counter exists for ps1 invocations.
Final test count: 365 pass / 5 skip / 0 fail / ~2279 expect() / 370 tests across 18 files (bun test 2>&1 | tail -5 must show this exact line).

stories.title: docs additive — Windows PS1 mentions in CHANGELOG, quickstart, troubleshooting (4 file edits)
acceptanceCriteria: CHANGELOG.md — v0.1.7 entry: Added (bin/install.ps1 + hooks/session-start.ps1 + hooks.json sibling powershell entry), Compatibility (Claude Code >= 2.1.84 required for `"shell":"powershell"` field), Honest tradeoff (US-1000 macOS noise outcome documented).

docs/pilot/vibe-coder-quickstart.ko.md (or main README if quickstart doesn't exist) — Windows section added: 'Claude Code 2.1.84+ 필요. 자동 설치는 PowerShell 5.1+ 사용. Git Bash/WSL 불필요.' Linux/macOS sections UNTOUCHED.
docs/pilot/admin-rollout.ko.md — Windows row added to platform support table (or paragraph mentioning PS1 hook).
bin/README.md:31 — already mentions windows-amd64.exe; extend with: 'Windows installer: bin/install.ps1 (PowerShell 5.1+, no Install-Module).' Linux/macOS lines UNTOUCHED.
bash tests/docs-link-audit.sh → Broken: 0.

stories.title: v0.1.7 release ship — bump + codegen + release-time grep cross-check + tag + CI green + verify
acceptanceCriteria: Step 1: Version bump 0.1.6 → 0.1.7 in package.json + .claude-plugin/{plugin,marketplace}.json.
Step 2 (release-time cross-check D2): `diff <(grep -oE 'v?0\.1\.7' bin/install.sh) <(grep -oE 'v?0\.1\.7' bin/install.ps1)` exit 0 — both files contain v0.1.7 literal.
Step 3: bun run codegen:version → install.sh + index.ts PLUGIN_VERSION + telemetry.ts.
Step 4: bun test 2>&1 | tail -8 → '365 pass / 5 skip / 0 fail / 370 tests across 18 files'.
Step 5: bunx tsc --noEmit → clean.
Step 6: bash tests/docs-link-audit.sh → Broken: 0.
Step 7: git commit + push origin main.
Step 8: git tag v0.1.7 + push origin v0.1.7 → CI release workflow auto-trigger.
Step 9: CI conclusion success.
Step 10: bash scripts/release/verify-release.sh v0.1.7 → 'All release assets verified'.
Step 11: Live binary self-report (downloaded darwin-arm64): `axhub-helpers 0.1.7 (plugin v0.1.7, schema v0)`.
Step 12: Windows VM smoke (or document deferred to next session — capture binary shape: PE32+ x86-64, 109.6M).
Step 13: docs/pilot/v0.1.7-verify-result.txt + launch-readiness-checklist baseline updated.
